info.title: NBAforecast
info.description: Explainable NBA predictions, stats hub, and live win probability.

schema.title: Response Get Player Shots Api V1 Players  Player Id  Shots Get
Response Get Player Rapm Api V1 Players  Player Id  Rapm Get
Response Get Player Props Api V1 Players  Player Id  Props Get

BoxScorePlayerLine.title: BoxScorePlayerLine
BoxScorePlayerLine.description: One player's box-score line within a game box score.

BoxScoreTeam.title: BoxScoreTeam
BoxScoreTeam.description: One team's totals plus its player lines, ordered starters-then-minutes.

Contribution.title: Contribution
Contribution.description:
One feature's signed contribution to a single prediction.

``display_label``/``formatted_value`` are placeholders (the raw feature name and
``str(raw_value)``) until T2.11's humanizer decorates them — see
``explain/explainers.py``'s module docstring.

Explanation.title: Explanation
Explanation.description:
The §5 explanation contract — every model head's ``explain()`` returns this shape.

``contributions`` is sorted by ``abs(contribution)`` descending (§5: "sorted by magnitude")
so the frontend can show the top-N headline drivers with the rest expandable. Additivity
holds in whichever ``units`` the explanation was computed in:
``sum(c.contribution for c in contributions) == prediction - baseline`` (T2.12 verifies this
for the SHAP path within floating-point tolerance).

GameBoxScore.title: GameBoxScore
GameBoxScore.description: ``GET /games/{game_id}/boxscore`` — both teams' totals and player lines for a played game.

GamePrediction.title: GamePrediction
GamePrediction.description:
backend-api.md §4 ``GamePrediction``.

``margin``/``total`` are reserved for the regressor heads (T3.1, M3 scope) — ``None`` until
then. ``market`` is reserved for the v2 odds-comparison feature (modeling.md §10).

GameSummary.title: GameSummary
GameSummary.description: One row of a games list — backend-api.md §3 ``GET /games``.

GameWinProbabilityTimeline.title: GameWinProbabilityTimeline
GameWinProbabilityTimeline.description:
``GET /games/{game_id}/win-probability`` — the in-game win-prob trajectory for a game.

Replays the stored play-by-play through the in-game win-prob champion: one point per usable
event, each with the home win probability and the SHAP drivers behind it at that moment.

HeadToHead.title: HeadToHead
HeadToHead.description: ``GET /teams/{team_id}/head-to-head`` — the series between two teams and its record.

LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: One row of a generic stat leaderboard — ``GET /stats/leaderboards``.

PlayerDetail.title: PlayerDetail
PlayerDetail.description: Full player profile — ``GET /players/{player_id}`` (profile + recent game logs).

PlayerGameLog.title: PlayerGameLog
PlayerGameLog.description: One recent game line on a player's profile.

PlayerGameStatLine.title: PlayerGameStatLine
PlayerGameStatLine.description: One game's values for the stat-trajectory chart — chronological per-game series.

PlayerSeasonAverages.title: PlayerSeasonAverages
PlayerSeasonAverages.description: A player's per-game averages for one season — the season/career table.

PlayerStatTrajectory.title: PlayerStatTrajectory
PlayerStatTrajectory.description:
``GET /players/{player_id}/stats`` — the per-game series plus season averages.

``games`` drives the trajectory chart (PTS/REB/AST/3PM/MIN tabs; RAPM comes from the
separate snapshot-cadence ``/rapm`` history). ``seasons`` drives the season/career table —
one row today, a career ladder once the full-era backfill lands.

PlayerSummary.title: PlayerSummary
PlayerSummary.description: One row of a players list — ``GET /players``.

RapmEntry.title: RapmEntry
RapmEntry.description: One leaderboard row — a player's RAPM from a single snapshot (backend-api.md §4).

RapmHistoryEntry.title: RapmHistoryEntry
RapmHistoryEntry.description: One point in a player's RAPM history — ``GET /players/{player_id}/rapm``.

ShotChartEntry.title: ShotChartEntry
ShotChartEntry.description:
One field-goal attempt for the shot chart — ``GET /players/{player_id}/shots``.

Respects ``location_reliable`` (data-model): unreliable-location attempts still count toward
make/miss but carry a flag so the frontend can omit them from the spatial chart.

TeamProfile.title: TeamProfile
TeamProfile.description: ``GET /teams/{team_id}/profile`` — record + roster + recent games for a team page.

WinProbabilityDriver.title: WinProbabilityDriver
WinProbabilityDriver.description: One factor moving the in-game win probability at a moment (thinking panel).

WinProbabilityPoint.title: WinProbabilityPoint
WinProbabilityPoint.description: One moment on the in-game win-probability timeline (one play-by-play event).

nbaforecast__api__schemas__games__TeamSu.title: TeamSummary
nbaforecast__api__schemas__games__TeamSu.description: The minimal team identity embedded in a game response.

nbaforecast__api__schemas__players__Team.title: TeamSummary
nbaforecast__api__schemas__players__Team.description: One row of a teams list — ``GET /teams``.
